investor.pendingDesc: Your account has been registered and is awaiting activation by a JABEEN administrator. You will gain access to your project portfolio once your account has been reviewed and activated.

investor.pendingActivateButton: I've been activated — sign in again
investor.emptyDesc: You haven't been assigned to any projects. Projects will appear here once an agreement is signed.

newDialog.description: Register a new JABEEN project. Required fields are marked with *.

overview.noPipelineDesc: No template pipeline has been assigned to this project yet.
overview.noFieldsRequired: No specific data required to complete this stage.

manage.metadataDesc: Update core details and assignments for this project.
manage.fieldPipelineDesc: Changing the pipeline does not delete historical updates, but may misalign stages.
manage.fieldAttentionFlagDesc: Manually flag this project to highlight it on dashboards.
manage.dangerZoneDesc: Irreversibly delete this project and all associated updates, messages, and documents.
manage.toastConflictDesc: This project was modified by another user while you were editing. Reload the page to get the latest version.
manage.deletePrompt: To delete this project, type its name: {{name}}

updates.submitDialogDesc: Record a milestone or completion percentage.
updates.stageOnlyCurrentNote: Only current and upcoming stages are available. Admins can revert to a previous stage.

updates.toastRequiredFieldsDesc: Please fill in all required fields before submitting.

updates.reviewDialogDesc: Review all submitted data before approving or rejecting.

users.noPendingAccounts: No pending accounts — all applicants have been processed.

confirm.deactivateDesc: Deactivate {{name}}? They will lose portal access until reactivated.

createDialog.description: Add a new staff member or investor to the portal.

users.confirmResetMfa: Reset MFA for {{name}}? They will need to re-enroll next time they log in.

templates.title: Stage Templates
templates.subtitle: Manage project lifecycle pipelines.
templates.noTemplatesDesc: Create a lifecycle pipeline template to assign to new projects.
templates.archiveConfirm: Archive this template? It will be hidden from new assignment pickers but existing projects remain unaffected.
templates.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete template "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
templates.deleteInUseConfirm: This template has been assigned to {{count}} project(s) and cannot be permanently deleted. Archive it instead? Archived templates are hidden from new assignment pickers but existing projects are unaffected.

templateBuilder.archivedAlert: This template version is archived and cannot be edited. Projects currently using it remain unaffected. To make changes, create a new template.
templateBuilder.inUseAlert: This template is currently assigned to <1>{{count}} project(s)</1>. Saving will create a new version; existing projects remain on version {{version}}.
templateBuilder.inUseConfirm:
This template is currently assigned to {{count}} project{{plural}}.

Saving will create a new version (v{{newVersion}}). Existing projects will remain on their current version — your changes apply only to new assignments.

detailsCard.title: Template Details
detailsCard.fieldDefault: Set as default for new projects

stages.subtitle: Define the steps a project moves through, in order.
stages.noFields: No custom fields for this stage.
stages.previewAddOptions: Add options above to see radio buttons.
stages.previewAddOptionsCheckbox: Add options above to see checkboxes.

toast.newVersionDesc: The previous version is archived. Existing projects remain pinned to their version.

cities.title: Cities
cities.subtitle: Manage portal cities.
cities.noCitiesDesc: Add your first city to make it available across the portal.

createDialog.title: Add City
createDialog.description: Create a new city for the portal.

editDialog.title: Edit City
editDialog.description: Update details for <1>{{name}}</1>. The code cannot be changed.

deleteDialog.title: Delete City
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete <1>{{name}}</1>? This cannot be undone. The operation will fail if this city has active projects.

toast.cannotDeleteDesc: Cannot delete a city with active projects

categories.title: Project Categories
categories.subtitle: Manage project category types.
categories.noCategoriesDesc: Add your first category to classify projects across the portal.

editDialog.title: Edit Category
editDialog.description: Update details for <1>{{name}}</1>. The code cannot be changed.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Category
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete <1>{{name}}</1>? This cannot be undone. The operation will fail if this category is in use by existing projects.

toast.cannotDeleteDesc: Cannot delete a category in use

settings.title: System Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure global portal parameters and thresholds.
settings.thresholdsDesc: Determine when projects are automatically flagged based on inactivity.
settings.delayedThresholdDesc: Days without an update before a project is marked Delayed.
settings.stalledThresholdDesc: Days without an update before a project is marked Stalled.
settings.securityDesc: Configure login protection and external alerts.
settings.maxLoginAttemptsDesc: Failed sign-in attempts allowed before login is temporarily throttled.
settings.throttleWindowDesc: How long the attempt count is measured over before it resets.
settings.emailNotificationsDesc: Send email alerts for important updates and messages.

validation.min: Enter a whole number of 1 or more.

error.title: Couldn't load settings
error.desc: Something went wrong while loading the system configuration.

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information and contact details.
profile.setupMfaSubtitle: Secure your account with an authenticator app.
profile.personalInfoDesc: Update how you are identified in the portal.
profile.mfaDesc: Add an extra layer of security to your account.
profile.mfaActiveDesc: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication using an authenticator app.
profile.mfaRequiredWarning: MFA is required for your role and cannot be disabled. Contact an administrator if you need to reset your authenticator.
profile.mfaPrivilegedDesc: Your role requires MFA enrollment. You will be prompted to enroll on your next login.
profile.mfaOptionalDesc: Protect your account by enabling two-factor authentication with an authenticator app like Google Authenticator or Authy.
profile.disableMfaConfirm: Disable two-factor authentication? Your account will be less secure.

toast.updatedDesc: Your profile has been saved successfully.
toast.mfaEnabledDesc: Two-factor authentication is now active on your account.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.projectRequiredForPM: Project is required for Project Manager activation

notFound.heading: Page not found
notFound.message: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have moved.

auth.headline: JABEEN Project Lifecycle Tracking
auth.subCopy: The authoritative portal for investors to track all JABEEN projects across the Royal Commission's cities.
auth.footerCompany: Jubail and Yanbu Industrial Cities Services Company (JABEEN)
auth.welcomeBackDesc: Enter your credentials to access the portal
auth.investorRegistrationDesc: Create an account to track your JABEEN projects
auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Please contact your JABEEN administrator to reset your password.

toast.mfaEnabledDesc: Your account is now protected with two-factor authentication.

mfa.enterCodeAuthApp: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
mfa.enterRecoveryCode: Enter one of your recovery codes.
mfa.invalidCodeDesc: The code was incorrect. Try again.
mfa.setupRequiredDesc: Your account requires MFA enrollment before you can access the portal. Use an authenticator app like Google Authenticator or Authy.
mfa.setupOptionalDesc: Secure your account with an authenticator app.
mfa.scanQr: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app:
mfa.addedAccountEnterCode: I've Added the Account — Enter Code
mfa.confirmDesc: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to complete enrollment.
mfa.saveRecoveryCodes: Save your recovery codes in a secure location. Each code can only be used once.
mfa.neverShownAgain: These codes will never be shown again. Store them somewhere safe.
mfa.savedCodesButton: I've Saved My Codes — Continue to Portal
mfa.invalidSetupCodeDesc: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
mfa.invalidSetupCodeVerifyDesc: The code was incorrect. Try again.
mfa.sessionExpired: Your sign-in session has expired. Please sign in again.
